feature/issue-77-standardize-process-res.task_description: Standardize Process: Resolve Technical Debt as Required Gaps
feature/issue-77-standardize-process-res.approach: Identify all technical debt items in the codebase and convert them into standardized required engineering tasks with documentation artifacts and consistent logic patterns.
out_of_scope: Implementing fixes for identified tech debt items — only documentation and standardization
Refactoring or modifying existing code beyond task creation
Changing milestone or release planning based on tech debt findings
Prioritizing or ranking the severity of individual tech debt items
feature/issue-77-standardize-process-res.risk_reason: Task involves standardizing technical debt process and converting identified tech debt items into required engineering tasks with documentation artifacts, which will necessarily modify requirements.json and formal model files (.planning/formal/) in the process, triggering high-risk guardrails.
